spotlight.title: Spotlight: Featured Cards
spotlight.note: Cards in bold have a particularly high adoption rate within their category.
spotlight.cat0_desc: Cards expected to be highly effective, especially in critical late-game situations like Act 4 boss battles.
spotlight.cat1_desc: Cards with exceptionally high tendency scores in both attack and defense or with silver/gold medals, expected to perform consistently well.
spotlight.cat2_desc: Cards with high-return potential on offense, accepting a manageable defensive risk.
spotlight.cat3_desc: Cards that excel at stabilizing combat by providing strong defense, accepting a manageable offensive risk.
spotlight.cat4_desc: Cards that may seem weak at first glance but have the potential for unexpected success under specific conditions.
spotlight.cat5_desc: Well-rounded cards that improve deck stability by balancing offense and defense.
spotlight.criteria_desc: Each card is evaluated based on the following conditions. Tendency scores range from -2.5 to 2.5, with ☆ for >=0.5 and ⭐ for >=0.75.
spotlight.star_cond1: Overall performance is below average, but has a highlight in the Act 4 boss battle.
spotlight.star_cond2: Has a medal, and all highlights are concentrated in Act 3 or later.
spotlight.star_cond3: Attack or Defense Tendency score exceeds 1.0.
spotlight.honor_cond1: Has a Gold or Silver medal.
spotlight.honor_cond2: Both Attack and Defense Tendencies are > 0.25, with one being > 0.75.
spotlight.honor_cond3: Has a Bronze medal or better, both tendencies > 0.25, and one > 0.5.
spotlight.honor_cond4: Sum of tendency scores is >= 0.75 with a medal, and overall performance is above average.
spotlight.balancer_cond1: Both Attack and Defense Tendencies are positive, and their sum is >= 0.5.
spotlight.high_roller_cond1: Attack Tendency is >= 0.25, and Defense Tendency is between -0.75 and 0.25.
spotlight.solid_defender_cond1: Defense Tendency is >= 0.25, and Attack Tendency is between -0.75 and 0.25.
spotlight.counter_cond1: Sum of tendency scores is < -1, and has a medal.

card_list.act1_top_adoption_desc: Cards frequently used in Act 1 combat. Includes cards that contribute to early-game stability.
card_list.act1_top_performers_desc: Cards that demonstrated high performance in Act 1 combat.
card_list.act4_top_adoption_desc: Cards frequently used in Act 4 combat, indicating the mainstays of late-game decks.
card_list.act4_top_performers_desc: Cards that demonstrated high performance in Act 4 combat, contributing significantly to clearing the game.
card_list.attention_ranking_desc: A comprehensive ranking based on adoption rate, highlights, and performance.
card_list.tendency_ranking_desc: Cards with a strong upward trend. Often powerful buffs or combo pieces.

route.title: Route Selection Tendency
route.desc: Shows the percentage of players choosing each node type at each floor. Hover over the bars for details.
route.placeholder: Select a node on the flowchart to see details.

run_finder.title: Run Finder
run_finder.experimental_warning: [Experimental Feature] This search function is under development.
run_finder.data_scope_warning: ※This search is limited to the data range used for statistics.
run_finder.initial_prompt: Enter search criteria and press the 'Search Runs' button.
run_finder.copy_link_success: Copied the shareable link to your clipboard!

controls.exclude_items_label: Exclude Items (all specified items will be excluded)

results.title: Found {count} runs
results.no_results: No runs were found matching the criteria.

act_trend.title: Act Trend Analysis
act_trend.desc:
Trends in card/exhibit acquisition, removal, and upgrades per Act. Values are average counts per run. Includes operations from events.
※A more detailed behavioral tendency report is generated separately for Act 1 only.

event_analysis.desc: Aggregated data for events on '?' nodes. Events are ordered chronologically. Choice tracking is simplified due to complexity.
